case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS ANDRAKIN, JAMES IND/DBA. RESIDENTIAL CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDRAKIN, JAMES IND/DBA.
